items.name_en: Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
items.name_cn:
Chane🌱New Large Chain Cosmetic Bag with Mirror Inside
This new box bag actually has a handle! I'm totally in love with the real thing 😌 It has a completely different vibe. Surprise + Amazement! Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld! Fits daily essentials like lipstick 💄, compact powder, keys, etc. The highlight is that it can also hold a large phone 📱 💅
Size: 9.5× 17 ×8cm
No.: 66021
With packaging

items.name_en: Chanel 24B Sheepskin Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24B Sheepskin Shell Bag in stock | Large batch photos
🖤This season's little dark horse🖤 This season's bright sheepskin shell bag is here🔥 No girl would refuse this bag, unless she hasn't fallen in love with it enough yet❗️❗️ The sheepskin really has great texture. I absolutely adore it at first sight. In my eyes, it is both fashionable and cute. I really can't praise it enough✌️✌️ The actual product is just incredibly, incredibly, incredibly, incredibly good-looking. It looks perfect from every angle💕💕 The shine is just right. This small bag is exquisite whether carried by hand or worn crossbody or on the shoulder, while full of vintage vibes🫶🫶 Go for it! Besties, buy it now❗️❗️❗️❗️
Size: 15*20*6cm
Model: AS5130

items.name_en: Chanel 24K Rhinestone Turn-lock Tote
items.name_cn:
Chanel 24K Rhinestone Turn-lock Tote
Captivated by the crystal handle at first glance, it's so unique~ Full of ethereal vibes. Paired with a gold chain and the iconic interlocking CCs, it adds a touch of luxury~ Exquisite smooth imported lambskin is a huge plus. The beauty queen of the season.
Size: 18cm
Model: 96102
